Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS JULIE M. HUEY, individually and as the Successor in Interest to BETTY WOO, Deceased; GENE WOO; AND IRENE WOO'S RE-NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER: 1. COMPELLING RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; 2. AWARDING MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND ITS COUNSEL.

APPEARANCES: Enoch Wang, Esq. of Wild, Carey & Fife 837-3101 for pltfs & moving parties; Nora M. Nachtsheim, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP 438-5934 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DID NOT ENGAGE IN A REASONABLE AND GOOD FAITH EFFORT TO MEET AND CONFER. REASONABLE SANCTIONS AWARDED TO DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,870. (CCP SECTION 2023.010(h) AND CCP SECTION 2023.020.) [PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.] (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
